acceptance_criteria.text: Apify business parsing propagates provider run cost metadata.
proof: ProspectingService returns usage_total_usd, usage_usd, usage, and run_data.
gaps: Depends on authenticated Apify run response exposing usage fields.

acceptance_criteria.text: Worker can find a reserved map_reviews_refresh reservation by metadata.parsequeue_id.
gaps: Future paid refresh enqueue must write this metadata.

acceptance_criteria.text: Worker calls actual-cost settlement only when source, cost, and reservation match.
proof: tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py verifies the settlement call payload.

acceptance_criteria.text: Missing cost or reservation skips settlement and does not block parse completion.
proof: Worker wraps settlement in a database savepoint.

acceptance_criteria.text: No paid refresh enqueue, UI trigger, external write, or map publication is introduced.
proof: Only worker/prospecting metadata and docs/tests changed.

known_gaps: Paid map refresh still needs preflight/reserve/enqueue and reservation metadata writing.
Telegram follow-up after refresh completion is still later.
